title: SWINDELLS RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: SWINDELLS RESOURCE CENTER SWINDELLS RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-person and online workshops and classes. Provides a Care Notebook to help organize health records. Also offers online and center-based resource libraries, where books can be borrowed and mailed. 9135 SW Barnes Road Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: Families and caregivers, with children who are experiencing developmental, behavioral, and complex health needs Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm, Friday 8am-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 215-2429 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (833) 868-4769 Main phone Main phone (503) 215-2429 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: No fees for resource support and library use. Some training events and workshops have a fee. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disability Related Parenting Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HELP ME GROW OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
